title: Butternut Squash Bake
excerpt: Ingredients 750 ml cooked butternut squash, well drained 3 jumbo eggs 250 ml cream 80 ml cake flour 80 ml maize flour 80 ml sugar 10 ml baking powder 5 ml salt Demerara or ordinary brown sugar fine ground cinnamon Method Mix all the ingredients except the …
html:
Ingredients

  • 750 ml cooked butternut squash, well drained
  • 3 jumbo eggs
  • 250 ml cream
  • 80 ml cake flour
  • 80 ml maize flour
  • 80 ml sugar
  • 10 ml baking powder
  • 5 ml salt
  • Demerara or ordinary brown sugar
  • fine ground cinnamon

Method

Mix all the ingredients except the Demerara or brown sugar and cinnamon together and blend smooth with an electric stick blender or in your food processor.

Spoon the mixture into one large, ovenproof pie dish greased with butter, or pour into greased muffin pans.

Bake in the oven at 180°C for 35 – 45 minutes or until cooked and set.

Mix the Demerara or brown sugar with the cinnamon to taste.

If you used a muffin pan, first turn out your bakes onto a serving plate.

Sprinkle the cinnamon sugar generously over the bake while it's still nice and warm and serve.

Makes 6 – 8 portions

Easy!
